A Letter

✦ written specifically for you ✦

✦
✦
April 2026 · From your most dramatic character
Hey manasi, How's life been? Let me guess. Hmm, awesome ever since u met me? lol ik what ur saying rn, that "I wish." But I don't need to wish for smng that's true right? Isn't having a character in your life who is the most dramatic, would force you into sidequests (which you ALWAYS say no to first and still end up doing eventually), fight like crazy, annoy you, ragebait u, make u laugh, look after u and always be besides you awesome to have? Your welcome. The night I saw u at the club, I hadn't thought you'd be this important to me at a point in my life. Because randomly seeing someone at a party, not even perceiving them much and then a year later realising they might be one of the biggest and most prominent characters in your life? That's something that rarely happens, and I am glad it happened. GSA potluck was the reason we started texting, and I guess it never stopped. But also, i'm glad we established that my dessert was better than yours, and that I can cook real good. I am at a loss of words right now cs I am trying to u know write down my thoughts abt u and us.
— your most dramatic sidequest enabler 🌙

One Last Thing...

✦ tap to unlock the secret ✦

"You're one of those rare people who makes the world measurably better just by existing in it."

manasi, on your birthday, I just want you to know that having you around is genuinely one of the best things. Every weird, chaotic, brilliant thing about you is exactly why you're my favourite person.

Happy Birthday. Two-twos my word. 🌙✨
